summary: This is a very brief announcement post directing readers to Stack Overflow Podcast #24, where the full Stack Overflow team gathered at Fog Creek's New York City office for a roundtable discussion about the future of StackOverflow.com. The post is essentially a pointer to the podcast episode hosted on the Stack Overflow blog. Joel closes with a Rosh Hashanah greeting in Hebrew.
key_points: The Stack Overflow team met in person at Fog Creek's new NYC office for a roundtable discussion
The discussion focused on the future direction of StackOverflow.com
The substantive content lives in the linked podcast episode rather than the blog post itself
money_quotes: The whole Stack Overflow team got together in person at Fog Creek's shiny new office in New York City for a roundtable discussion about the future of StackOverflow.com.
key_insight: This is a brief link post announcing a Stack Overflow podcast episode recorded at Fog Creek's NYC office, with no substantive analysis in the post itself.
